sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good progress! I clicked the top row blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 (the ones below the purple blocks). Looking at the current image:
- Top row: blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 are cleared (these are below the purple blocks)
- Top row: blocks at cols 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 remain
- Bottom row: all 7 blocks remain
So clicking the top row blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 worked without causing game_over. This confirms that the issue is specifically with the BOTTOM row block at cols 19-23 (directly above the player).
Now let me think about what to do next. The hypothesis is that I need to clear the green blocks that align with the purple blocks. I've cleared the top row blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29. Now I need to clear the bottom row blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29.
But clicking the bottom row block at cols 19-23 causes game_over. So maybe I need to clear the bottom row blocks at cols 13-17 and 25-29 first, then figure out how to clear the one at cols 19-23.
Or maybe the goal is to clear ONLY the top row blocks that align with the purple blocks, and leave the rest. Let me check if the level completes after clearing just those 3 blocks.
Actually, looking at the current image, the level is not complete. So I need to do more.
Let me try clearing the bottom row blocks at cols 13-17 and 25-29 (skipping the one at cols 19-23 for now).
